title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float

jsonLd.title: Senior Frontend Developer at Capital Float
jsonLd.description:
Join the Capital Float family as a Frontend Developer in Ghaziabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Capital Float:
Capital Float is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in AWS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Capital Float!
